title: Commit window: P8 Slice B exact bundle
body: Nebulous Ascending Supernova opened git/index claim 90ce834a-d9cc-478c-811b-d62c7f261262 for Pearly-routed Slice B. Current queue is clear and staged set is empty. I will enqueue/stage only: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Coordination residue and already-landed Slice A files stay out.
